note: the seed of the woman crushing the serpent — first announced, finally fulfilled
the seed of the woman born of woman in the fullness of time
the God of peace shall bruise Satan under your feet shortly
through death destroy him that had the power of death
Abel's blood crying out; the blood of Jesus that speaks better things than Abel
from the blood of righteous Abel unto the blood of Zacharias
the ark wherein few were saved by water; baptism doth also now save us
the bow in the cloud; a rainbow round about the throne
in thee shall all families be blessed; the scripture preached the gospel beforehand to Abraham
to Abraham and his seed; he saith not seeds as of many but of one, which is Christ
Melchizedek king of Salem, priest of the most high God
a priest forever after the order of Melchizedek
thou art a priest forever after the order of Melchisedec
Abraham believed God and it was counted to him for righteousness
even as Abraham believed God
and the scripture was fulfilled which saith, Abraham believed God
take now thy son, thine only son Isaac, whom thou lovest; God so loved the world that he gave his only begotten Son
Abraham took the wood of the burnt offering, and laid it upon Isaac; bearing his cross
God will provide himself a lamb; behold the Lamb of God
received him as from the dead in a figure
ladder set up on the earth; ye shall see heaven open and the angels of God ascending and descending upon the Son of man
sold Joseph to the Ishmaelites for twenty pieces of silver; what will ye give me and I will deliver him? thirty pieces
and he refused; flee also youthful lusts
yet within three days shall Pharaoh lift up thine head; this Jesus hath God raised up
I am Joseph your brother whom ye sold; at the second time Joseph was made known to his brethren
ye thought evil against me, but God meant it unto good; all things work together for good
I AM THAT I AM; before Abraham was, I am
a lamb for an house; Christ our passover is sacrificed for us
when I see the blood I will pass over you; being now justified by his blood
neither shall ye break a bone thereof; that the scripture should be fulfilled, A bone of him shall not be broken
the LORD went before them by day in a pillar of cloud; they drank of that spiritual Rock which followed them; and that Rock was Christ
the LORD caused the sea to go back; were all baptized unto Moses in the cloud and in the sea
I will rain bread from heaven; my Father giveth you the true bread from heaven
it is manna for they wist not what it was; I am the bread of life
smite the rock and there shall come water; that spiritual Rock was Christ
ye shall be unto me a kingdom of priests; ye are a chosen generation, a royal priesthood
thou shalt have no other gods before me; thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart
Behold the blood of the covenant; this is my blood of the new testament
look that thou make them after their pattern which was shewed thee in the mount; see saith he that thou make all things according to the pattern shewed to thee in the mount
thou shalt make a vail; a new and living way which he hath consecrated for us, through the veil that is to say, his flesh
the veil of the temple was rent in twain from the top to the bottom
the Urim and the Thummim; will give him a white stone with a new name
once a year shall make atonement; into the second went the high priest alone once every year, not without blood
blot me out of thy book; I could wish that myself were accursed from Christ for my brethren
shall put his hand upon the head of the burnt offering; by the which will we are sanctified through the offering of the body of Jesus Christ
shall lay both his hands upon the head of the live goat, and confess over him all the iniquities; the LORD hath laid on him the iniquity of us all
the goat shall bear upon him all their iniquities; he hath made him to be sin for us
the life of the flesh is in the blood; without shedding of blood is no remission
Moses made a serpent of brass; as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, even so must the Son of man be lifted up
there shall come a Star out of Jacob; we have seen his star in the east
Hear O Israel, the LORD our God is one LORD
the LORD thy God will raise up unto thee a Prophet from the midst of thee, of thy brethren, like unto me; Moses truly said unto the fathers, A prophet shall the Lord your God raise up
he that is hanged is accursed of God; Christ hath redeemed us, being made a curse for us
the wall fell down flat; by faith the walls of Jericho fell down
Moreover Ruth the Moabitess have I purchased to be my wife; husbands love your wives even as Christ also loved the church
Samuel took the horn of oil and anointed him; he raised up unto them David to be their king
I will set up thy seed after thee; he would raise up Christ to sit on his throne
I will establish the throne of his kingdom for ever; I will be to him a Father and he shall be to me a Son
the queen of Sheba heard of the fame of Solomon; the queen of the south shall rise up; a greater than Solomon is here
O LORD my God let this child's soul come into him again; trouble not yourselves for his life is in him
a still small voice; my sheep hear my voice
his flesh came again like unto the flesh of a little child; the washing of regeneration
I know that my redeemer liveth; now is Christ risen from the dead
Thou art my Son this day have I begotten thee; for unto which of the angels said he at any time, Thou art my Son
as it is written in the second psalm, Thou art my Son this day have I begotten thee
what is man that thou art mindful of him; one in a certain place testified saying, What is man
thou wilt not leave my soul in hell; because thou wilt not leave my soul in hell
My God my God why hast thou forsaken me; Eli Eli lama sabachthani
all they that see me laugh me to scorn, they shoot out the lip; they that passed by reviled him wagging their heads
they pierced my hands and my feet; except I shall see in his hands the print of the nails
they part my garments among them, and cast lots upon my vesture; that the scripture might be fulfilled which saith, They parted my raiment among them, and for my vesture they did cast lots
the LORD is my shepherd; I am the good shepherd
he keepeth all his bones, not one of them is broken
mine own familiar friend in whom I trusted, which did eat of my bread, hath lifted up his heel against me; he that eateth bread with me hath lifted up his heel against me
in my thirst they gave me vinegar to drink; that the scripture might be fulfilled, saith, I thirst
The LORD said unto my Lord, Sit thou at my right hand; The Lord said unto my Lord, Sit thou on my right hand
Thou art a priest forever after the order of Melchizedek
the stone which the builders refused is become the head stone of the corner
unto you therefore which believe he is precious
the LORD possessed me in the beginning of his way; who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of every creature
who hath ascended up into heaven, or descended; no man hath ascended up to heaven, but he that came down from heaven
I saw also the Lord sitting upon a throne; these things said Esaias when he saw his glory and spake of him
a virgin shall conceive; behold a virgin shall be with child
unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given; for unto you is born this day in the city of David a Saviour
upon the throne of David, and upon his kingdom; the Lord God shall give unto him the throne of his father David
a rod out of the stem of Jesse, a Branch shall grow out of his roots; the Lion of the tribe of Juda, the Root of David
he will swallow up death in victory; death is swallowed up in victory
I lay in Zion for a foundation a stone, a tried stone, a precious corner stone; behold I lay in Sion a chief corner stone, elect, precious
the voice of him that crieth in the wilderness, Prepare ye the way of the LORD; for this is he that was spoken of by the prophet Esaias
behold my servant whom I uphold; behold my servant whom I have chosen
I gave my back to the smiters, and my cheeks to them that plucked off the hair; they took the reed and smote him on the head
despised and rejected of men; he came unto his own and his own received him not
surely he hath borne our griefs; that it might be fulfilled, Himself took our infirmities and bare our sicknesses
he was wounded for our transgressions, bruised for our iniquities; by whose stripes ye were healed
he is brought as a lamb to the slaughter; he was led as a sheep to the slaughter
because he had done no violence neither was any deceit in his mouth; who did no sin, neither was guile found in his mouth
he was numbered with the transgressors; he was reckoned among the transgressors
I will make an everlasting covenant with you, even the sure mercies of David; I will give you the sure mercies of David
the Spirit of the Lord GOD is upon me; the Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he hath anointed me to preach the gospel
I will make a new covenant with the house of Israel; Behold the days come saith the Lord when I will make a new covenant
I will forgive their iniquity, and I will remember their sin no more; I will be merciful to their unrighteousness, and their sins and their iniquities will I remember no more
I will set up one shepherd over them, and he shall feed them, even my servant David; I am the good shepherd
a new heart also will I give you; written not in tables of stone but in fleshy tables of the heart
behold one like the Son of man came with the clouds of heaven; hereafter shall ye see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven
shall Messiah be cut off but not for himself
after two days will he revive us, in the third day he will raise us up; that he rose again the third day according to the scriptures
out of Egypt have I called my son; that it might be fulfilled which was spoken of the Lord by the prophet saying, Out of Egypt have I called my son
I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh; I will pour out of my Spirit upon all flesh
I raise up the tabernacle of David that is fallen; I will return and will build again the tabernacle of David
Jonah was in the belly of the fish three days and three nights; so shall the Son of man be in the heart of the earth three days and three nights
thou Bethlehem Ephratah, though thou be little among the thousands of Judah, yet out of thee shall he come forth; and thou Bethlehem in the land of Juda art not the least among the princes of Juda
thy King cometh unto thee, lowly, and riding upon an ass; tell ye the daughter of Sion, Behold thy King cometh unto thee meek, and sitting upon an ass
they weighed for my price thirty pieces of silver; covenanted with him for thirty pieces of silver
a goodly price that I was prised at of them; and they took the thirty pieces of silver
they shall look upon me whom they have pierced; they shall look on him whom they pierced
smite the shepherd, and the sheep shall be scattered; I will smite the shepherd, and the sheep of the flock shall be scattered
I will send my messenger and he shall prepare the way before me; Behold I send my messenger before thy face which shall prepare thy way
I will send you Elijah the prophet; why then say the scribes that Elias must first come
blessed are the poor in spirit; the LORD hath anointed me to preach good tidings unto the meek
blessed are the meek for they shall inherit the earth; the meek shall inherit the earth
hunger and thirst after righteousness; ho everyone that thirsteth come ye to the waters
blessed are the pure in heart; he that hath clean hands and a pure heart
hallowed be thy name; I will sanctify my great name
come unto me all ye that labour and are heavy laden; ye shall find rest for your souls
the heart of the earth three days and three nights
this is my blood of the new testament; this is the blood of the testament
Eli Eli lama sabachthani; My God my God why hast thou forsaken me
yielded up the ghost; he hath poured out his soul unto death
the veil was rent in twain; through the veil that is to say his flesh
the veil was rent in twain from the top to the bottom; the veil of separation
he is not here for he is risen
to give his life a ransom for many; when thou shalt make his soul an offering for sin
the Spirit of the Lord is upon me; the Spirit of the Lord GOD is upon me
this cup is the new testament in my blood; I will make a new covenant
all things must be fulfilled which were written in the law of Moses and in the prophets and in the psalms; in the volume of the book it is written of me
in the beginning was the Word; in the beginning God
the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us; the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle
behold the Lamb of God which taketh away the sin of the world
ye shall see heaven open and the angels of God ascending and descending upon the Son of man; a ladder set up on the earth
as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness; Moses made a serpent of brass
a well of water springing up into everlasting life; come ye to the waters
my Father giveth you the true bread from heaven; I will rain bread from heaven
out of his belly shall flow rivers of living water; with joy shall ye draw water out of the wells of salvation
I am the good shepherd; the LORD is my shepherd
one fold and one shepherd; I will set up one shepherd over them
Hosanna: Blessed is the King of Israel that cometh in the name of the Lord; Blessed be he that cometh in the name of the LORD
that the scripture might be fulfilled which saith, They parted my raiment among them, and for my vesture they did cast lots
that the scripture should be fulfilled, A bone of him shall not be broken; neither shall ye break a bone thereof
he keepeth all his bones not one of them is broken
they shall look on him whom they pierced; they shall look upon me whom they have pierced
reach hither thy finger and behold my hands; what are these wounds in thine hands? Those with which I was wounded in the house of my friends
thou wilt not leave my soul in hell; thou wilt not leave my soul in hell
the stone which was set at nought of you builders, which is become the head of the corner; the stone which the builders refused is become the head stone of the corner
who was delivered for our offences and was raised again for our justification; he was wounded for our transgressions
by one man sin entered into the world; she took of the fruit thereof and did eat
by the obedience of one shall many be made righteous; obedient unto death, even the death of the cross
we are buried with him by baptism into death; buried with him in baptism
he that spared not his own Son but delivered him up for us all; because thou hast not withheld thy son, thine only son
Christ our passover is sacrificed for us; a lamb for an house
that spiritual Rock that followed them and that Rock was Christ; smite the rock and there shall come water
this cup is the new testament in my blood; I will make a new covenant
rose again the third day according to the scriptures; in the third day he will raise us up
the first man Adam was made a living soul, the last Adam was made a quickening spirit; God formed man of the dust of the ground and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life
made him to be sin for us who knew no sin; shall lay both his hands upon the head of the live goat and confess over him all the iniquities
being made a curse for us, Cursed is everyone that hangeth on a tree; he that is hanged is accursed of God
to Abraham and his seed; And to thy seed will I give this land
in whom we have redemption through his blood; by his own blood he entered in once into the holy place, having obtained eternal redemption for us
when he ascended up on high he led captivity captive; thou hast ascended on high, thou hast led captivity captive
for this cause shall a man leave his father and mother; therefore shall a man leave his father and his mother and shall cleave unto his wife
every knee should bow; unto me every knee shall bow
who being the brightness of his glory and the express image of his person; who is the image of the invisible God
Thou art my Son this day have I begotten thee
through death destroy him that had the power of death, that is, the devil; thou shalt bruise his head
was in all points tempted like as we are yet without sin; he is despised and rejected of men
this Melchisedec king of Salem priest of the most high God; Melchizedek king of Salem
into the second went the high priest alone once every year, not without blood; once in the year
by his own blood he entered in once into the holy place, having obtained eternal redemption for us; he shall bring his blood within the vail
without shedding of blood is no remission; the life of the flesh is in the blood
a new and living way which he hath consecrated for us, through the veil that is to say his flesh; the veil of the temple was rent in twain
by faith Abel offered unto God a more excellent sacrifice than Cain; the LORD had respect unto Abel and to his offering
by faith Noah, being warned of God of things not seen as yet, moved with fear, prepared an ark; the end of all flesh is come before me
by faith Abraham, when he was called to go out into a place which he should after receive for an inheritance, obeyed; get thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred
by faith Abraham, when he was tried, offered up Isaac; Abraham built an altar there, and laid the wood in order, and bound Isaac
the precious blood of Christ, as of a lamb without blemish and without spot; your lamb shall be without blemish
behold I lay in Sion a chief corner stone, elect, precious; I lay in Zion for a foundation a stone, a tried stone, a precious corner stone
by whose stripes ye were healed; with his stripes we are healed
the blood of Jesus Christ his Son cleanseth us from all sin; the life of the flesh is in the blood
every eye shall see him, and they also which pierced him; they shall look upon me whom they have pierced
the Lion of the tribe of Juda, the Root of David; there shall be a root of Jesse
a Lamb as it had been slain; he is brought as a lamb to the slaughter
God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes; the Lord GOD will wipe away tears from off all faces
a man child who was to rule all nations with a rod of iron; thou shalt break them with a rod of iron
clothed with a vesture dipped in blood; wherefore art thou red in thine apparel
thrones, and they sat upon them, and judgment was given unto them; judgment was given to the saints of the most High
the tabernacle of God is with men, and he will dwell with them; my tabernacle also shall be with them
there shall be no more death, neither sorrow, nor crying; he will swallow up death in victory
I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end, the first and the last; I am the first and I am the last and beside me there is no God
the bright and morning star; there shall come a Star out of Jacob
